brand.name: James & James
brand.announcementText: Cylindo 3D Product Visualization Demo — James & James

products.name: Everly Side Dining Chair
products.description: A beautifully crafted dining chair combining modern elegance with everyday comfort. Available in a curated selection of upholstery and finish options, each piece is made to order.

highlights.title: Handcrafted
highlights.description: Each chair is made to order by skilled craftspeople.

highlights.title: Premium Materials
highlights.description: Choose from boucle, mohair, velvet, and leather upholstery options.

highlights.title: Multiple Finishes
highlights.description: Available in Almond, Oat, and Sable wood finishes.

highlights.title: Comfortable Design
highlights.description: Ergonomic proportions for long, comfortable dining.

highlights.title: Interactive 3D
highlights.description: Explore every angle with Cylindo's 360° viewer.

faqs.q: How long does delivery take for made-to-order pieces?
faqs.a: Made-to-order pieces typically ship in 8-12 weeks.

faqs.q: Can I see the fabrics and finishes in person?
faqs.a: Visit the James & James showroom at 111 S Main St, Springdale, AR 72764, or contact us for swatches.
Made-to-order items are final sale. We encourage visiting our showroom or ordering swatches first.

products.name: Olivia Dining Table Set with Everly Chair
products.code: OLIVIA DINING TABLE SET WITH EVERLY SIDE DINING CHAIR
products.description: The complete Olivia dining experience — a beautifully proportioned table paired with Everly Side Dining Chairs. Configure the full set in 3D to see exactly how it will look in your space.

highlights.title: Complete Set
highlights.description: Table and chairs designed to work together in perfect harmony.

highlights.title: Coordinated Finishes
highlights.description: Table and chairs share the same finish options for a cohesive look.

highlights.title: Configurable
highlights.description: Mix upholstery and finish to create your ideal dining set.

highlights.title: Made to Order
highlights.description: Each set is handcrafted to your specifications.

highlights.title: 3D Visualization
highlights.description: See the complete set from every angle before you order.

items: Olivia Dining Table + Everly Side Chairs

faqs.q: How many chairs are included in the set?
faqs.a: Contact James & James for set configuration options and pricing.

faqs.q: Can I mix finishes between table and chairs?
faqs.a: The 3D viewer shows coordinated finishes. Contact us for custom configurations.

products.name: Rustic Windsor Dining Chair
products.description: A timeless Windsor silhouette reimagined with rustic charm. Solid hardwood construction in your choice of three curated finishes.

highlights.title: Windsor Heritage
highlights.description: Classic spindle-back design with a modern rustic twist.

highlights.title: Solid Hardwood
highlights.description: Built from quality hardwood for lasting durability.

highlights.title: Three Finishes
highlights.description: Choose Almond, Oat, or Sable to match your table.

highlights.title: Handcrafted
highlights.description: Each chair is individually made to order.

highlights.title: Interactive 3D
highlights.description: Explore every angle with Cylindo's viewer.

faqs.q: Is this chair comfortable without upholstery?
faqs.a: The Windsor design features a contoured seat and ergonomic back for comfortable dining.

faqs.q: Can this pair with the Olivia table?
faqs.a: Yes! See the Olivia Table Set with Rustic Windsor Chair for the complete look.

products.name: Olivia Table Set with Rustic Windsor Chair
products.code: OLIVIA DINING TABLE SET WITH RUSTIC WINDSOR DINING CHAIR
products.description: The Olivia dining table paired with Rustic Windsor chairs for a warm, inviting farmhouse aesthetic. See the complete set in 3D.

highlights.title: Farmhouse Charm
highlights.description: Classic Windsor chairs paired with the elegant Olivia table.

highlights.title: Coordinated Finish
highlights.description: Table and chairs in the same finish for a unified look.

highlights.title: Solid Construction
highlights.description: Hardwood throughout for heirloom quality.

highlights.title: Made to Order
highlights.description: Handcrafted to your exact specifications.

highlights.title: Full 360° View
highlights.description: See the complete set from every angle.

items: Olivia Dining Table + Rustic Windsor Chairs

faqs.q: How many chairs come with the set?
faqs.a: Contact James & James for set configurations and pricing.

products.name: Olivia Dining Table
products.description: The Olivia Dining Table features clean lines and beautiful proportions. Available in three curated finishes, each table is made to order from solid hardwood.

highlights.title: Clean Design
highlights.description: Timeless proportions that work in modern and traditional spaces.

highlights.title: Solid Hardwood
highlights.description: Built to last from quality hardwood construction.

highlights.title: Three Finishes
highlights.description: Choose Almond, Oat, or Sable for your space.

highlights.title: Pairs Perfectly
highlights.description: Designed to coordinate with Everly and Windsor chairs.

highlights.title: Interactive 3D
highlights.description: Rotate and zoom to see every detail.

faqs.q: What size is the Olivia table?
faqs.a: Contact James & James for dimension details and sizing options.

faqs.q: Which chairs pair with this table?
faqs.a: The Everly Side Chair and Rustic Windsor Chair are designed to coordinate with the Olivia table.
